---
title: "New Request 03-11-2026"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-11"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tableone)
library(writexl)
library(gtsummary)
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(ggpubr)
library(splines)
library(xlsx)
library(lattice)
library(mice)
library(DescTools)
library(survminer)
library(finalfit)
library(tidycmprsk)
library(ggsurvfit) 
library(sqldf)
library(table1)
library(cobalt)
library(riskRegression)
library(prodlim)
library(pammtools)
library(adjustedCurves)

# read in master dataset in the same way as prior analyses
final_master <- read_xlsx("/Users/to909/Desktop/Terlipressin/final_master_0508.xlsx")

# center variable consistent with previous work
final_master <- final_master %>% 
  mutate(
    discont_before_day3 = ifelse(Discont_Day < 3, 1, 0),
    pc_change_before_day3 = ifelse(
      (dosechange_terli_day1 == 1 | dosechange_terli_day2 == 1 | dosechange_terli_day3 == 1) & Discont_Day > 3,
      1, 0
    ),
    pc_nochange_after_day3 = ifelse(
      dosechange_terli_day1 == 0 & dosechange_terli_day2 == 0 & dosechange_terli_day3 == 0 & Discont_Day > 3,
      1, 0
    ),
    pc_day3 = ifelse(Discont_Day == 3, 1, 0)
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    pc_change_before_day3 = ifelse(is.na(pc_change_before_day3), 0, pc_change_before_day3),
    pc_nochange_after_day3 = ifelse(is.na(pc_nochange_after_day3), 0, pc_nochange_after_day3)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    center_id = stringr::str_extract(subjectid, "^[^-]+"),
    center = dplyr::case_when(
      center_id == "BID"  ~ 1,
      center_id == "BSW"  ~ 4,
      center_id == "CCF"  ~ 10,
      center_id == "CPM"  ~ 5,
      center_id == "CSF"  ~ 5,
      center_id == "INU"  ~ 10,
      center_id == "MAYO" ~ 7,
      center_id == "MCM"  ~ 7,
      center_id == "MGH"  ~ 1,
      center_id == "MMC"  ~ 9,
      center_id == "NWM"  ~ 7,
      center_id == "OCH"  ~ 3,
      center_id == "PEN"  ~ 2,
      center_id == "UNM"  ~ 5,
      center_id == "Yale" ~ 1
    )
  )

final_master$center <- as.factor(final_master$center)

# key predictor variables requested
predictor_vars <- c(
  "sex_male",
  "scr_admit",
  "tbili_admit",
  "sodium_admit",
  "inr_admit",
  "bili_terli_day0",
  "he_terli_day0",
  "inr_terli_day0",
  "map_terli_day0_time0",
  "fio2_terli_day0",
  "spo2_terli_day0",
  "scr_terli_day0"
)

# outcome variables used in prior work
outcome_vars <- c(
  "hrs_responders_cat_2",
  "HRS_reversal_new",
  "time_to_death_90days_cmp",
  "time_to_death_status_90days_cmp"
)

analysis_vars <- c(predictor_vars, outcome_vars)

mi_data <- final_master %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(analysis_vars))
```

### Multiple imputation with `mice`

```{r mi-setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(20260311)

# inspect missingness
# md.pattern(mi_data)

# simple predictive mean matching imputation
imp <- mice(
  mi_data,
  m = 20,
  method = "pmm",
  maxit = 50,
  seed = 20260311,
  printFlag = FALSE
)

```

### Logistic model after multiple imputation (example: HRS reversal)

```{r mi-logistic-hrs-reversal, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ensure outcome is treated as binary
imp$imp$HRS_reversal_new

fit_logit_hrs <- with(
  imp,
  glm(
    HRS_reversal_new ~
      sex_male +
      scr_admit +
      tbili_admit +
      sodium_admit +
      inr_admit +
      bili_terli_day0 +
      he_terli_day0 +
      inr_terli_day0 +
      map_terli_day0_time0 +
      fio2_terli_day0 +
      spo2_terli_day0 +
      scr_terli_day0,
    family = binomial
  )
)

pool_logit_hrs <- pool(fit_logit_hrs)
summary(pool_logit_hrs)

tbl_logit_hrs <- tbl_regression(
  pool_logit_hrs,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  pvalue_fun = ~ style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3)
) %>%
  bold_p(0.05) %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_logit_hrs
```

### Fine-Gray model after multiple imputation (time to death, transplant as competing)

```{r mi-finegray, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# create list of completed datasets
completed_list <- complete(imp, "all")

# fit Fine-Gray model (failcode = 1 as in prior work)
fit_crr_list <- lapply(
  completed_list,
  function(dat) {
    dat$time_to_death_status_90days_cmp <- as.factor(dat$time_to_death_status_90days_cmp)
    tidycmprsk::crr(
      Surv(time_to_death_90days_cmp, time_to_death_status_90days_cmp) ~
        sex_male +
        scr_admit +
        tbili_admit +
        sodium_admit +
        inr_admit +
        bili_terli_day0 +
        he_terli_day0 +
        inr_terli_day0 +
        map_terli_day0_time0 +
        fio2_terli_day0 +
        spo2_terli_day0 +
        scr_terli_day0,
      failcode = 1,
      cencode = 0,
      data = dat
    )
  }
)

# extract coefficients and log-HR across imputations
coef_mat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(fit_crr_list, function(f) f$coef))
coef_mean <- colMeans(coef_mat, na.rm = TRUE)

hr_est <- exp(coef_mean)
hr_est
```

### Example Fine-Gray model on one imputed dataset with `tbl_regression`

```{r mi-finegray-tbl, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dat1 <- completed_list[[1]]
dat1$time_to_death_status_90days_cmp <- as.factor(dat1$time_to_death_status_90days_cmp)

fit_crr_dat1 <- tidycmprsk::crr(
  Surv(time_to_death_90days_cmp, time_to_death_status_90days_cmp) ~
    sex_male +
    scr_admit +
    tbili_admit +
    sodium_admit +
    inr_admit +
    bili_terli_day0 +
    he_terli_day0 +
    inr_terli_day0 +
    map_terli_day0_time0 +
    fio2_terli_day0 +
    spo2_terli_day0 +
    scr_terli_day0,
  failcode = 1,
  cencode = 0,
  data = dat1
)

tbl_crr_dat1 <- tbl_regression(
  fit_crr_dat1,
  exp = TRUE
) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  bold_p(0.05) %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_crr_dat1
```
